name: MCU Avengers RPG
description:
Marvel Cinematic Universe RPG

This is potentially being added to and updated, just FYI.

If you're using Open AI, and the bot starts talking all Shakespearian after a while, just know that it is an Open AI issue, and I cannot fix it.

I have done pretty extensive testing with Janitor LLM and it does pretty well. If it starts being wonky, you can switch to Open AI for a few messages and then switch back, that seems to get it back on track.

The bot may speak for you a little at first. If you just edit the first few messages it should catch on. Also I have noticed that if you avoid using your character's name and say "he/she/they" instead, that seems to help keep it from speaking for you as well.

If you would like a specific character to have more of a description that doesn't already have one, leave a review and if the token count isn't too high, I will add to it.

Thanks!
creator: flegin
